items.title: Hollander POTD Alvin Robertson. Arkansas G drafted 7th in 84 by SA. Great defender led NBA in spg 3x. A 4x all-star, peaking at 19.6 ppg, 6.1 rpg, 6.8 apg in 87-88. Declined due to injuries & other issues. Per bio: "the pit bull of NBA guards."
